title: verification_report
description: Verifier output — per-claim pass/partial/fail/skipped verdicts and an overall score. v1 schema.

paper_id.description: Paper identifier matching the directory name.

overall_score.description: Mean of pass=1.0, partial=0.5, fail=0.0. Skipped claims are excluded. null when all claims are skipped.

verdict.description: LLM judge verdict, or 'skipped' when results data is placeholder/null.

confidence.description: LLM judge confidence (0.0–1.0). Set to 0.0 for skipped claims.

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the verdict (≤30 words for non-skipped, 'results data is placeholder (null)' for skipped).

claimed_value.description: The expected value or claim from the paper.

observed_value.description: The actual value observed in results.json.

verifier_model.description: LLM model used for claim judging (e.g. 'deepseek-v4-pro').

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of verification run.

warnings.description: Non-blocking issues encountered during verification (e.g. evidence lookup misses).
